title: Replace placeholder header banner with uploaded image

requirements.summary: Replace the placeholder header banner image in the BrandingBanner component with the custom banner image from frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: The BrandingBanner component displays the custom banner image instead of the placeholder
The banner image is loaded from a static asset path in frontend/public/assets/generated
The banner maintains proper aspect ratio and responsive sizing
No placeholder or default banner is visible after the change

file_operations.description: Replace the placeholder banner image with the generated custom header banner located at frontend/public/assets/generated/header-banner.dim_1200x300.png. Update the image source to reference the static asset path, ensuring proper responsive sizing and aspect ratio maintenance. Remove any placeholder or default banner references to display only the custom banner image.
